title: V1.4 WS3 — Preset loader + novel-writing end-to-end

metadata.description: YAML -> graph-flow::Graph loader + validation, ACP-touching capabilities (acp.prompt/acp.session_load/judge.llm), full AcpPromptTask + InnerGraphTask impls, embedded novel-writing preset (4 states + 2 inner graphs), mocked-agent E2E test across all states + daemon-restart durability. Minimal nexus42 schedule start/status/advance CLI (WS7 grows this).
commits: cf6c21d feat(orchestration): ACP capabilities + AcpPromptTask + acp_worker JSON-RPC loop (WS3 T4)
f90bd39 feat(orchestration): preset YAML -> graph-flow::Graph mapping per §8.2 (WS3 T3)
8eb83b1 feat(orchestration): full InnerGraphTask (child session + output_binding export) (WS3 T5)
3f2ea0f feat(orchestration): embed novel-writing preset with 5 states and 2 inner graphs (WS3 T6)
48f3167 feat(cli): nexus42 schedule start/status/advance (minimal; WS3 T7)
36668ea test(orchestration): novel-writing E2E against mocked ACP worker (WS3 T8, compass R5)
metadata.notes: All T1-T10 complete. Batch 4 (T7-T10) done. Full CI gate passed.
